source: OpenSSF malicious-packages (OSV format); seeded by Backstabber's Knife Collection, Ohm et al. DIMVA 2020

model_mapping.note_p_q_r: p (build cadence) and r (downstream adoption) set the timing; q (token-theft fraction) set P(reach stage 2)=q exactly (parametric). The CanisterWorm npm package was 1 of the 1048 npm malicious packages published in the incident month (Mar 2026).
model_mapping.consistency: model fastest-adversary times (6 / 16 days) are LOWER BOUNDS, consistent with the observed ~28-day Feb->Mar window; the surplus is adversarial patience, captured by the MDP's nondeterministic weaponization timing.
